basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Oceanography (NIO) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Associate - I. Candidates with MSc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 07-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIO official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc Marine Science, MSc Oceanography, MSc Physical Oceanography, MSc Space Science and Technology

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: NIO Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
